issues.description: Targeted Vitest run could not start in this sandbox: config loading failed with `Error: spawn EPERM` from esbuild/Vite. Static review and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed, but the added tests were not executable here.
issues.recommendation: Run the targeted Vitest suite in a non-restricted local/CI environment.
issues.deferRationale: Environment/sandbox process-spawn restriction, not an implementation defect.
